---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-discussion']
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 🚀 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🎨 Mockups/Wireframes
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or sketches to help explain your feature.

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
Define what needs to be done for this feature to be considered complete:
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 👥 User Role Impact
Which user roles would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] SuperAdmin
- [ ] Panitia
- [ ] Juri
- [ ] Peserta
- [ ] Pelatih
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Guest users

## 🏗️ Technical Considerations
**Frontend:**
- [ ] New UI components needed
- [ ] State management changes
- [ ] Routing updates
- [ ] API integration

**Backend:**
- [ ] Database schema changes
- [ ] New API endpoints
- [ ] Authentication/authorization changes
- [ ] Third-party integrations

**Infrastructure:**
- [ ] Docker configuration updates
- [ ] Environment variable changes
- [ ] Performance considerations
- [ ] Security implications

## 📊 Priority/Impact
**Business Impact:**
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Improves user experience
- [ ] High - Addresses key user needs
- [ ] Critical - Essential for business goals

**Development Effort:**
- [ ] Small (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Large (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] Extra Large (> 2 weeks)

## 🔗 Related Issues
Link any related issues, feature requests, or discussions.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, research, or documentation about the feature request here.

## 🎯 Success Metrics
How will we measure the success of this feature?
- Metric 1: [e.g. User engagement increase]
- Metric 2: [e.g. Time saved per user]
- Metric 3: [e.g. Error reduction]
